events.title: Runtastic HEBER: HALF MARATHON
events.description: Run for Autism. Run HEBER. Join us in experiencing the breathtaking beauty of Heber Valley as you race down an all-downhill half marathon course, surrounded by stunning mountain views and the crisp canyon air of the Wasatch Mountains. Make Runtastic HEBER a tradition for your family. Enjoy an unforgettable race, a vibrant and welcoming atmosphere, and the opportunity to give back. Runtastic will donate a portion of every registration to a local autism charity.
events.location: 1600 E 980th S, Heber City, UT

events.title: The Freaky 5K
events.description: FREAKY 5K: OUTRUN THE APOCALYPSE Where survival isn’t guaranteed… but the thrill is. Do you have what it takes to outrun the undead? Step into the ultimate zombie-infested race experience where every turn hides a threat, every shadow creeps with danger, and every step could be your last. The Freaky 5K isn’t just a run— it’s a fully immersive zombie apocalypse adventure built to test your speed, your nerve, and your will to survive. As you race through our terror-charged course, you’ll encounter: Chasing Zombies ready to hunt you down Action Obstacles designed to challenge your agility and k...
events.location: 2002 Olympic Dr, Midway, UT

events.title: DASH Sprint Adventure Race Soloist
events.description: Get ready for an unforgettable Adventure challenge that blends trekking, biking, and navigation across the rugged beauty of Utah and the Uinta-Wasatch-Cache National Forest. We offer two options: 1) A 4 hour sprint adventure race suitable for beginner to intermediate trail runners, mountain bikers, and will require navigation with a map and compass; 2) Family-friendly 2 hour adventure race. Children 15 and under are free and must be accompanied by an adult; each adult requires a registration. The Rev3 DASH Sprint Adventure race will utilize the Slate Creek mountain biking trails; racers wil...
events.location: Forest Rd 431, Kamas, UT

events.title: High Uinta Half Marathon: Half Marathon
events.description: High Uinta Half Marathon is a fast race above Kamas/Francis area. We reluctantly use the term Drop13 because of what it represents. Drop13 represents a course that is extremely fast downhill. This course is 99% decline for 13.1 Miles. 2600 feet of decline with very little incline or even flat portions. This course is not just fast but beautiful. Aspens, pines, rivers, are throughout the route. This route starts at one of the highest elevations in Utah for races. Last year July 4, the starting point still had snow all around. This is a great course to get out of the heat and enjoy more of a ...
events.location: 5175 E Hwy 35, Kamas, UT
